text:
Your $3,400 ACH withdrawal from Monday, still showing "pending review" as of Thursday — I've got that.

I can't say why it's still pending from here, so I'm passing this to our payments ops team to look into it directly. To help them locate it faster, it's useful to have the last 4 digits of the receiving bank account and the approximate time you submitted the request.

They'll follow up once they have an update.

Novig Support
